title: chrysosplenium fauriei
intro: Chrysosplenium fauriei, also known as Fauriei's golden saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have potential in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Chrysosplenium fauriei have been reported to provide several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as tea or taken in supplement form, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and potential side effects.
